messages.subject: TTI + OpenAI — AI Automation Implementation Partner — $122B Round Congratulations
messages.content:
Congratulations on completing the $122B funding round — the largest in Silicon Valley history.

With that capital, OpenAI will need thousands of implementation partners to deploy ChatGPT Enterprise and OpenAI API solutions to the 33 million SMBs in America.

Total Transformation Inc. (TTI) is applying to be an official OpenAI implementation partner in Los Angeles — deploying OpenAI-powered AI voice agents and automation systems for small businesses.

WHAT TTI BRINGS:
• Active client base in Los Angeles across 18 verticals
• Proven AI automation deployment system (live at https://aaronreddix1987-sketch.github.io)
• Revenue OS white-label platform built on AI APIs
• 100+ outbound emails fired this week to SMB prospects

We want to co-sell OpenAI Enterprise to TTI's client pipeline. Every TTI client becomes an OpenAI customer.

How do we join the OpenAI partner program?

Aaron T. Reddix
CEO — Total Transformation Inc.
(747) 301-8586 | ceomrreddix@gmail.com

messages.subject: TTI + Amazon Globalstar Deal — AI IoT Control Tower on Amazon Leo Network
messages.content:
Amazon just acquired Globalstar for $11.57B to build Amazon Leo — a global satellite network.

Total Transformation Inc. (TTI) has built the Stingray Control Tower — an AI-powered remote pump and industrial IoT control platform that needs exactly what Amazon Leo provides: global satellite connectivity for remote field operations.

THE OPPORTUNITY:
• Stingray Control Tower + Amazon Leo = remote oil pump control from anywhere on earth
• No cellular coverage required — satellite-powered IoT control
• TTI becomes a launch partner for Amazon Leo industrial IoT
• Amazon Leo becomes the connectivity backbone for Stingray's global expansion

Product demo: https://aaronreddix1987-sketch.github.io/stingray-control-tower.html

Who is managing Amazon Leo commercial partnership opportunities?

Aaron T. Reddix
CEO — Total Transformation Inc.
(747) 301-8586 | ceomrreddix@gmail.com

Aaron T. Reddix

messages.subject: NIH Seed Fund Application — Total Transformation Inc. — AI Health Automation for Underserved Communities
messages.content:
Dear NIH Seed Fund Team,

Thank you for reinstating the NIH Small Business Seed Fund program. Total Transformation Inc. (TTI) is applying immediately.

COMPANY: Total Transformation Inc.
EIN: 32-0663781
Address: 877 E 43rd Pl, Los Angeles CA 90011
CEO: Aaron T. Reddix
Phone: (747) 301-8586

PROJECT: AI Health Navigation System for Underserved Communities in South Central Los Angeles

PROBLEM: 500,000+ residents of South Central LA lack consistent access to healthcare navigation. Language barriers, transportation, and lack of information prevent timely care.

SOLUTION: TTI is developing an AI voice agent that helps South Central LA residents navigate healthcare options — scheduling appointments, finding low-cost clinics, translating medical information, and following up on care — in English and Spanish, 24/7, at no cost to users.

FUNDING REQUEST: Phase I Seed Fund grant

IMPACT: 10,000+ South Central LA residents with improved healthcare access in Year 1.

Please advise on the application portal and current open solicitations.

Aaron T. Reddix
CEO — Total Transformation Inc.
(747) 301-8586 | ceomrreddix@gmail.com
